name: GCI-Wifi-Recon
summary: The program is designed to show the number of devices that are  connected on your Wi-Fi network along with  the mac address and ip address of those devices.

documentation.readme: The program is designed to show the number of devices that are connected on your Wi-Fi network along with the mac address and ip address of those devices.

Fits when the engagement needs: The program is designed to show the number of devices that are  connected on your Wi-Fi network along with  the mac address and ip address of those devices.

documentation.how_to_use: Clone or install `GCI-Wifi-Recon` from its upstream repository, then run `GCI-Wifi-Recon --help` (or the README entrypoint) to confirm flags. The program is designed to show the number of devices that are connected on your Wi-Fi network along with the mac address and ip address of those devices.
